narrative_scene_description: To the left of MISSION SCHOOL [entity_003] stands the establishment labeled WROOM REEM SONS NTS 5 101 [entity_001]. Beside MISSION SCHOOL [entity_003] is KOMAL CAFE [entity_004], where 2 pedestrians are seen walking near the entrance. To the left of KOMAL CAFE [entity_004] is an advertisement banner for RISE UP BABY! [entity_002] that contains an image of a man holding a baby [entity_012]. To the right of the cafe is ASIAN BAKERY [entity_030], and 3 auto-rickshaws are parked along the road nearby. Above the bakery is a sign for Mount Litera SCHOOL AFFILIATED [entity_016]. Adjacent to ASIAN BAKERY [entity_030] is HOTEL LOTUS PARK LUXURY & COMFORT LIVING [entity_034]. Beside the hotel is JP Residency HOMES & PARTY HALL [entity_035]. To the right of JP Residency [entity_035] is the ALEEMEE PUBLIC SCHOOL [entity_036], which displays a notice of its 100% RESULT IN THE ICSE 10TH STD BOARD EXAMS OF MARCH 2023 [entity_038]. Adjacent to the school is the CA HOTEL GULSHAN RESIDENCY [entity_040]. Near the hotel entrance stands a Blue parking sign with 'P' symbol and text 'LADIES PARKING' and 'From 36 AM' [entity_045]. To the right of CA HOTEL GULSHAN RESIDENCY [entity_040] is the AAM ADMI PARTY [entity_043] office. Beside this office is AKBAR TOWER [entity_048], where 4 pedestrians are traversing the sidewalk. To the left of AKBAR TOWER [entity_048] is the Jai Bhavani Maratha Khanayali [entity_053]. Adjacent to AKBAR TOWER [entity_048] is the DR. S. S. PATIL COMPLEX [entity_051]. To the right of the complex is BALAJI SWEETS [entity_056]. Beside the sweets shop is Apollo Pharmacy [entity_058]. Adjacent to the pharmacy is POORNIMA WINES [entity_061]. To the right of the wine shop is Ruma-T SHATS [entity_062]. Beside the shirt shop is BAJAJ Doors & Hardware [entity_065]. Adjacent to the hardware store is R. G. PADSHETTY Sri Ram Deen Temple & Haveli [entity_066]. Beside the temple is the airtel 5G Plus [entity_068] sign. To the right of the airtel sign is VILAYANAND TRAVELS MARIKANDI GATEWAY TO HOMES COFFEE [entity_071]. Across from the travels office is DENTAL CARE HOSPITAL [entity_078], which stands beside UNIQUE FOOT WEAR [entity_079]. Adjacent to the footwear shop is EAR SAPTAGIRI OPTICAL EYE SPECIALIST [entity_085]. To the right of the optical shop is EXIDE [entity_086]. Beside EXIDE [entity_086] is EUROGRIP [entity_087]. Adjacent to EUROGRIP [entity_087] is AMAY ELECTRICALS [entity_088].
temporal_progression_description: At the beginning of the clip, at 00:00, the vehicle passes MISSION SCHOOL [entity_003] and KOMAL CAFE [entity_004] amidst slow-moving traffic. Shortly after, by 00:15, the vehicle moves past the ASIAN BAKERY [entity_030] and HOTEL LOTUS PARK [entity_034]. As the vehicle continues forward around 00:30, it passes ALEEMEE PUBLIC SCHOOL [entity_036] and the CA HOTEL GULSHAN RESIDENCY [entity_040]. Further along the road at 01:00, the camera captures BALAJI SWEETS [entity_056], Apollo Pharmacy [entity_058], and the POORNIMA WINES [entity_061] shop. Near the end of the clip, at 01:30, the vehicle reaches the intersection near VILAYANAND TRAVELS [entity_071] and concludes the journey past DENTAL CARE HOSPITAL [entity_078] and AMAY ELECTRICALS [entity_088] under an overcast sky.
